mapper.update: /* updateNotices */ UPDATE notices SET title = #{param.title}, content = #{param.content}, chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE notice_id = #{param.noticeId}
/* deleteNotices */ UPDATE notices SET del_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE notice_id = #{param.noticeId}
